stemHtml: During an emergency with all avionics inoperative and no ATS contact, by how much should the PIC deviate from the normal IFR cruising level to indicate a problem?

options.a: 500 ft where a 1000 ft vertical separation minimum applies, and 1000 ft where a 2000 ft minimum applies.
options.b: 500 ft where a 1500 ft vertical separation minimum applies, and 1000 ft where a 2000 ft minimum applies.
options.c: 150 ft where a 300 ft vertical separation minimum applies, and 300 ft where a 600 ft minimum applies.
options.d: 150 ft where a 1000 ft vertical separation minimum applies, and 300 ft where a 2000 ft minimum applies.
